message:
chore: add .gocache and beads recovery dirs to .gitignore

Prevents future agents from committing Go build cache (~3500 files),
beads recovery snapshots, and .beads_snapshot directories.

History was just rewritten with git-filter-repo to expunge these
from all prior commits (saved ~116 MB from the repo).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,3 +109,11 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .env
 .claude/settings.local.json
 .gomodcache/
+
+# Go build cache (NEVER commit this — an agent did once, 3500+ files, 100+ MB)
+.gocache/
+
+# Beads recovery/snapshot artifacts (ephemeral debugging state)
+.beads/recovery_*/
+.beads/recovery_snapshot_*/
+.beads_snapshot_*/
